task_updates.executor_notes: Added the `_summary_for_tool` branch for `post_topic` before the legacy branches. New `post_topic` summaries now return exactly `{"blocks": args.get("blocks") or []}` with no top-level `body` and no `sections`. Verified the upsert call site still passes the original `call["name"]` into `_summary_for_tool`, so storage shape remains tied to the model's original tool name and legacy telemetry/storage labels are not normalized away. Direct import-level smoke check asserted `post_topic`, legacy sectioned, legacy simple, and watch shapes. Syntax parse passed; `pytest tests/test_topic_editor_media_understanding.py -q` passed.
